Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-09-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng, via ZOOM, for Loren Loo, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that now that the decedent's daughter's estate has been probated, she has the documents required to file a petition and requests a continuance. The court advises counsel that it is concerned with the liquidation of assets in the daughter's estate without court approval. Counsel provides oral testimony regarding the preceding and ultimately reports that some of the actions stated by the court may have been made without her knowledge but that she will provide an explanation regarding the transfer of assets from the daughter's estate to this estate in her papers. The court advises counsel that it will be adding a status hearing on close of estate in the daughter's estate case.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to August 9, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. A Status hearing on Close of Estate is also set in related case: PES-19-303097, Estate of Lisa Chuk King Loo, for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported?
